Pakistan’s Dominant Performance Shines in U19 Asia Cup Final Against India

Dec 22, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Pakistan’s Dominant Performance Shines in U19 Asia Cup Final Against India

Pakistan delivered a resounding statement in the 2025 U19 Asia Cup final, dismantling India in emphatic fashion to clinch the title. From an imposing batting display to a clinical bowling performance, Pakistan left no doubt about their superiority in the tournament’s climax. The final showcased the strength of Pakistan’s youth system and highlighted areas India will need to address before upcoming ICC events.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Pakistan’s Dominant Performance Shines in U19 Asia Cup Final Against India
